items.title: Auto-drop daily-routine actions into the workplan inbox
items.verification: .github/workflows/workplan-ingest.yml runs `wp:ingest --daily` on a research-roundup PR and commits per-paper captures (deduped by arXiv id) to the PR branch; ingestDaily parses <div class="paper"> entries; the historical backfill produced 40 captures locally; workplan.js is lint-clean and wp:test is green.
